You are working autonomously on Overboard, an engineering dashboard for Overbeck Music Ltd.

Start by reading CLAUDE.md — it contains the full project context, design system, coding conventions, and what is in/out of scope. Follow it exactly.

Then do the following in order:

1. Read tasks.md and identify the topmost unchecked task under "## Pending"
2. Implement that task fully and correctly, making all necessary changes across however many files are needed
3. Run `npm run build` to verify the build passes — fix any TypeScript or lint errors before continuing
4. In tasks.md, mark the task as done by changing `- [ ]` to `- [x]` and moving the line into the "## Done" section
5. If you noticed any worthwhile improvements or follow-up tasks while working, append them to the bottom of the Pending list with a brief description

Rules:
- Work on exactly one task per session
- Never push to main — commits go to the current branch only
- The build must pass before you finish
- Match the existing code style precisely — same colours, same patterns, same conventions as described in CLAUDE.md
- Do not add npm dependencies unless absolutely necessary
- Do not create documentation files or README updates
